creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed with significant changes, the most important being: 

1. patches/patch-foo has ONE FILE per patch 
2. I moved the startup script into files/ instead of being a patch 
3. I made this port respect CFLAGS 
4. Use pkg/MESSAGE for post-install instructions, then the package users 
see it too. 
5. I fudged around with a lot of your variables, sorry. :>
